translation.literal_translation: If it be said, 'not so, because of indicators of jiva and chief prana' - that has already been explained. (17)
translation.technical_translation: Sutra 1.4.17: objection from jiva/prana markers is not decisive; its resolution has already been supplied through prior contextual analysis.
translation.interpretive_note: Carry-forward sutra: reuses established hermeneutic resolution against repeated linga-objection.

lexical_notes.contextual_sense: Tracks each block inside the section-level inferential sequence

uncertainty_notes: Technical gloss is intentionally concise because sutra points to prior reasoning.
